description: Rebuild dashboard page with Bento Grid Command Center layout (Idea 1)
steps: Rewrite frontend/app/dashboard/page.tsx with a two-column Bento Grid layout:
Keep all existing data fetching, state management, auth checks, and loading/empty states from the current file
Morning briefing remains as a full-width hero banner at top (the MorningBriefing component is already imported and used - keep it)

Two-column layout on desktop (grid-cols-3): Left column (col-span-2) contains Today's Timeline with a vertical timeline view (time markers along a vertical line), Right column (col-span-1) contains quick stats badges and upcoming tasks list
Stats should appear as inline badges/chips (similar to the StatChip pattern in MorningBriefing.tsx) rather than full-width cards
Timeline view: vertical line on the left with time markers, events displayed along the timeline with time labels. Use the existing events data.
Bento-style cards with varying sizes - use rounded-2xl borders, bg-[var(--surface)] backgrounds
Framer Motion entrance animations (stagger children pattern already in the file)
Ensure dark and light mode both work - use dark: overrides for text colors (dark:text-[#ece9e4], dark:text-[#a8a39c], dark:text-[#847e76])
Keep warm/minimalistic style - no pixel fonts, use the existing color variables
Preserve the AutoPilotPanel import and rendering at the bottom
Keep the StreakBadge, EveningReflection, and empty state (welcome) flow
Keep all the existing useEffect hooks for data fetching, visibility refresh, etc.
On mobile (sm and below), stack the columns vertically
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard renders with two-column bento grid layout on desktop
Morning briefing appears as full-width hero at top
Left column shows today's timeline with vertical time markers
Right column shows quick stats as badges and upcoming tasks
All existing functionality preserved (data fetching, auth, navigation, empty states)
Works in both dark and light mode
